content.en:
Illusory Dream Realm, Forbidden Land.

When Ye Tian entered here, he immediately sensed the situation of this forbidden place, and also knew the strength of the members of the Illusory Dream Realm guarding here.

Five supreme beings, thousands of ancestors.

"It seems that the Illusory Dream Realm still values the Dark Forbidden Domain, and has sent so many powerhouses!"

Ye Tian said with slight surprise.

At this time.

The powerhouses of the Illusory Dream Realm also saw Ye Tian, and their expressions changed drastically one by one.

"Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws!"

It's not that they don't know Ye Tian's strength, it is precisely because they know Ye Tian's strength that they sent five supreme powerhouses, and one of them has reached the third level.

But they also knew very well that relying on the five strongest people alone would not be able to stop Ye Tian at all, even if they relied on the formation here, it was useless.

Of course, they didn't know Ye Tian's purpose, and if they didn't come to fight, then there was no need to be nervous.

And yet—

Ye Tian shot directly!

Rumble!!!!

The strength of the Seven Tribulations Realm of the Flesh Body exploded, and the terrifying momentum crushed all the powerhouses here.

The members of the Illusory Dream Realm below those supreme ones didn't even have the ability to move, and the five supreme powerhouses were also trembling, and their hearts were extremely terrifying.

"Seven Tribulations of the Flesh Realm!How is this possible?"

They simply couldn't believe it.

After all, the Illusory Dream Realm had also fought against Ye Tian in the Dark Forbidden Domain before, although Ye Tian's strength was far stronger than that of the ordinary third-level supreme powerhouse, he definitely did not survive a physical tribulation, otherwise his aura would not be hidden.

It is difficult for the strongest to improve their strength when they reach the third level, and they can only cross the body tribulation or soul tribulation and gradually improve towards the invincible realm.

However, absorbing the power of the calamity to refine the flesh body, such a speed is too slow and too time-consuming.

Many of the strongest third-level powerhouses have spent thousands of great tribulations to survive five physical tribulations, and they have the qualifications to impact the invincible.

But Ye Tian has only passed a few dark tribulations since the last time, and he has survived seven physical tribulations at once, which is too abnormal!

Originally, Ye Tian was already very powerful, but now that he has survived seven physical tribulations, it is conceivable how much his strength has improved.

Therefore, the moment Ye Tian made a move, the five strongest people in the Illusory Dream Realm wanted to escape, and they had no idea of fighting at all.

It's a pity that their strength is too weak to escape at all.

"Five Elements Ban!"

This is Ye Tian's supreme ancestral technique, and it has also been promoted step by step from a holy skill, and now it has reached the level of supreme ancestral skill, even if it is the strongest, it is difficult to break the blockade of the five elements ban.

Airplanes!!!!

This forbidden area was directly blocked, making it impossible for these supreme and the strong under the supreme to escape.

"Seal!"

The Five Elements Seal continued to shrink, turning into seals one by one to seal the power of a strong person, and even the five strongest people were quickly sealed, and their strength could not be exerted at all, that is, there was no way to escape.

"Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws, what are you doing here, do you want to start a war with our Illusory Dream Realm? The strength of the Illusory Dream Realm is far beyond what you imagined, you are looking for death!"

One of the strongest men said angrily.

"Oh, the strength of the Illusory Dream Realm is far beyond what I imagined, I have already reached the Seven Tribulations Realm of the Flesh, and I am still afraid of your Illusory Dream Realm?" Ye Tian sneered.

The supreme powerhouse threatened, "We have three invincible Illusory Ancestors in the Illusory Dream Realm, and our leader is far beyond the ordinary Invincible Ancestors, you are simply an ant compared to our Illusory Dream Realm!"

"Oh, thank you for telling you the strength of the Illusory Dream Realm!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

"You...... Deliberately!" The supreme man was stunned, and immediately became furious, he had inadvertently revealed the strength of the Illusory Dream Realm, although it was not a big deal, but he was very annoyed.

"You go and inform the Unreal Dream Realm, I want to make a deal with the Unreal Dream Realm!" Ye Tian released a top Phantom Ancestor and asked him to notify the Unreal Dream Realm headquarters.

The other party immediately shuttled through the second-order gate, left this forbidden place, and headed to the heaven and earth where the Illusory Dream Realm was located.

It didn't take long.

A terrifying aura forcibly shuttled through the second-order gate, wanting to cross the domain.

Obviously, the other party is an invincible person who surpasses the strongest one, that is, the invincible illusion ancestor of the illusory dream realm.

After all, the strongest can easily pass through the second-order gate, and only the invincible need to pay a price to be able to cross the second-order gate.

Click!!

Void Shock!

A figure forcibly crossed the second-order gate and descended on this forbidden place.

"Hitomi Ancestor, help!"

An illusory ancestor in the Illusory Dream Realm begged for help.

Pupil Ancestor, one of the three giants of the Illusory Dream Realm, is invincible in the Illusory Ancestor realm, and his strength is incomparably strong.

However, this time it was forcibly descended, and its strength dropped by at least thirty percent, but it still had the combat power of the invincible Phantom Ancestor.

At this time, he saw that Ye Tian had detained so many illusory dream realm phantom ancestors, and he was immediately extremely angry.

Immediately, he wanted to attack Ye Tian with illusion and kill Ye Tian completely.

Countless illusions struck, Ye Tian adhered to his original heart, and roared: "Get out!"

Countless illusions shattered!

At this time, the pupil ancestor released a pupil attack, turned into a sharp blade, and slashed towards Ye Tian, it seemed to be an ordinary pupil technique, but it was very terrifying, not only to cut the body, but also to cut the soul.

However.

Ye Tian blasted over with a punch, and the superimposed power of the Extreme Arm Supreme Ancestral Technique plus the Body Dominance Supreme Ancestral Technique, coupled with the power attached to the Seven Tribulations Realm of the Flesh Body, made the power of this punch terrifying to the extreme.

The void in front of him was directly annihilated by a punch, and even the pupil technique attack of the Pupil Ancestor was shattered with a single punch, but this attack also left a blood mark on Ye Tian's fist, which could be regarded as hurting Ye Tian.

"You actually have the invincible power of the Ancestor!"

Hitomi was amazed.

Although the strongest of the Seven Tribulations Realm of the Flesh Body is strong, it is definitely far from the invincible level, but now Ye Tian has the combat power of the invincible ancestor, obviously the foundation is too deep, and he has created many, many supreme ancestral skills at the supreme level, which can have such a powerful combat power.

Moreover, almost all of the Seven Tribulations of the Flesh Body have a chance of being promoted to an invincible person, unless they are too unlucky to die in the process of breaking through.

He can't kill such a strong man, even if the leader arrives, but once the Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws escapes into the Dark Forbidden Domain, even if they are not afraid of the rules of the Dark Forbidden Domain, they will be suppressed most of their strength, and they will not be able to help Ye Tian at that time, and there is even a danger of falling.

"You can't offend the Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws!" Hitomi Ancestor thought to himself.

So, Hitomi Ancestor didn't make a move, but asked, "Ten Thousand Law Ancestor, what do you want to do, how can you give up these members?"

Ye Tian pondered for a moment and said his request.
